title: euphrasia ramosa
intro: Euphrasia ramosa, also known as the Himalayan eye-bright, is a perennial plant that belongs to the gentian family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye problems and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Euphrasia ramosa include relieving conjunctivitis, blepharitis, and other eye infections, as well as soothing coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
